added: Download button state management — button disables after click to prevent duplicate downloads, shows 'Please wait...' with faded appearance, re-enables on setting changes or 6-second timeout
Cache management in Settings — displays current cache size with clear button to free up storage
Enhanced Help Screen — comprehensive documentation covering Downloads, Converter, Compressor, Navigation tabs, Settings, Troubleshooting, and About sections
YouTube DASH video+audio download support — improved format selection for higher resolution downloads
Artifact cleanup workflow — GitHub Actions workflow automatically deletes artifacts older than 2 days
fixed: Cookie auth bug — cookies were not being applied for age-gated YouTube content without PO tokens
Output file visibility — converted and compressed files now accessible via file managers
Download state clarity — users can now clearly see when download button is disabled vs enabled
FFmpeg progress parsing — removed duplicate code, now uses shared FfmpegProgressParser
improved: YouTube cookie authentication — cookies now applied when YouTube auth is enabled OR PO token is provided
Converter output location — converted files copied to public Downloads/LocalDownloader folder
Compressor output location — compressed files copied to public Downloads/LocalDownloader folder
Help page — completely rewritten with much more detailed information
removed: Custom update() function in MediaToolsViewModel — now uses proper kotlinx.coroutines.flow.update
comingSoon: Embedded terminal for custom yt-dlp commands
YouTube DASH higher resolution downloads (720p, 1080p, etc.)
Compressor improvements with presets and estimated size
